docs: we denote reference_amount = x0, cliff_fee_numerator = c, fee_increment = i
if input_amount <= x0, then fee = input_amount * c
if input_amount > x0, then input_amount = x0 + (a * x0 + b)
then fee = x0 * (c + c*a + i*a*(a+1)/2) + b * (c + i * (a+1))
if a = max_index + d, input_amount = x0 + max_index * x0 + (d * x0 + b)
then fee = x0 * (c + c*max_index + i*max_index*(max_index+1)/2) + (d * x0 + b) * MAX_FEE
types.name: BorshFeeRateLimiter

docs: The init price of the pool as a sqrt(token_b/token_a) Q64.64 value. Market cap fee scheduler minimum price will be derived from this value
fields.name: sqrtPrice
